ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leaf_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaf sample */,
  "final_id" TEXT /* Final ID assigned to the sample */,
  "sample_number" INTEGER /* Sample number for the specific final ID */,
  "leaf_area_cm2" REAL /* Leaf area in square centimeters */,
  "leaf_mass_g" REAL /* Leaf mass in grams */,
  "lma_gm2" REAL /* Leaf Mass Area (LMA) in grams per square meter */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "initials" TEXT /* Initials of the researcher who collected the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or annotations for the sample */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the sample */,
  "sample_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sample (e.g., fresh, dry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaf_samples_initials FOREIGN KEY ("initials") REFERENCES researchers ("initials")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "initials" TEXT /* Initials of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the plant species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant species */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the plant species is found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the plant species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the plant species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the plant species */,
  "cultivar" TEXT /* Cultivar of the plant species (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the location in meters */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Soil type at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_plants" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf sample */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_locations" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf sample */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf sample */,
  "observation_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., weather, soil conditions) */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "observation_value" TEXT /* Value of the observation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or annotations for the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_observations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES leaf_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES leaf_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf sample */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or annotations for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES leaf_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf sample */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_notes" TEXT /* Notes or annotations for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_images_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES leaf_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leaf sample */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_publications_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES leaf_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES sample_publications ("publication_id")
)
